_comment: Random Dot Motion Task - Configuration File
_instructions: Modify these parameters to change experiment behavior. All timing in seconds.

text.instructions:
RANDOM DOT MOTION TASK

You will see a cloud of moving dots.
Your job is to judge the direction in which most dots are moving.

Press '{left_key}' for LEFT
Press '{right_key}' for RIGHT

Respond as QUICKLY and ACCURATELY as possible.
There is no time limit, but please respond promptly.

Press SPACE to begin the practice trials.
text.practice_start:
PRACTICE TRIALS

You will now complete {n} practice trials.
Feedback will be provided after each response.

Press SPACE to begin.
text.practice_end:
Practice complete!

You scored {score}% correct.

The main experiment will now begin.
No feedback will be given.

Press SPACE to continue.
text.block_break:
Block {current} of {total} complete.

Take a short break.

Press SPACE when ready to continue.
text.end:
Experiment complete!

Thank you for participating.

Press SPACE to exit.
